title: Improved Bedrockean
description: Adds the bedrockean origin with changes and improvements to make it more balanced compared to the original
body:
This mod adds the bedrockean origin with a modification to make it less broken to use in large servers by removing it's ability to collect bedrock. All of the other abilities have been left the same, requiring fabric and the origins mod to function properly. 

 

This origin will give you the following abilities:


Fire Immunity: immune to all fire damage
Acrobatics: never take fall damage
Strong Arms: can break stone without tools
Unwieldy: can't use shields or bows
large appetite: you consume more food
heavy body: you can barely jump a block high
Bedrock skin: you are immune to drowning, starvation, and are a darker tint
bright sun: gain blindness in sunlight
no elytra: can never use an elytra
miner: you mine faster below y0 and gain extra armour
short: 1 block tall
earth familiarity: you can find hidden treasures
unable to eat normal food
you can eat ores (other than diamonds and netherite)
Dark vision: can see in the dark
